What Institutes Are Saying

“EduCore transformed how we operate. Fee collection is now fully automated, and parents get real-time updates. We saved 40 hours/month on admin work.”

RS

Rahul Sharma

Director, Apex IIT Academy, Delhi

“The doubt-solving module is a game changer. Students get answers within 10 minutes, and our retention rate improved by 35% in just 3 months.”

PP

Priya Patel

Founder, Spark Learning Center, Surat

“Switching to EduCore was the best decision. Live classes, mock tests, analytics — everything is seamlessly connected. Highly recommended!”

Vikram Singh

Principal, Success Point, Jaipur

“Our teachers love how easy it is to upload content and manage doubts. Student engagement improved dramatically. EduCore simply works.”

AD

Anita Desai

Head, Momentum Coaching, Pune

“Managing 1200 students was a nightmare before EduCore. Now everything — attendance, fees, results — is on one screen. Absolutely brilliant.”

Owner, Bright Future School, Lucknow

“The fee reminder automation alone saved us ₹2L in pending dues last month. The ROI is incredible. Every coaching center needs this.”

“Parents love the real-time updates. Teachers love the doubt system. Management loves the analytics. EduCore is a win for everyone.”

The Complete Ecosystem

One System, Three Worlds.

For Management

Full Operational Control with Real-Time Intelligence

Track every rupee, monitor every student, and manage every staff member from a single, high-performance dashboard. Built for owners who want growth.

Fee OS

1-Click Reminders

Staff Control

Access Management

For Teachers

Teach, Monitor, and Inspire with Powerful Tools

Doubt solving system, live class management, and automated test creation. Let your teachers focus on teaching, while the OS handles the boring stuff.

Doubt Solver

Timestamp Support

Auto Evaluation

Instant Results

For Students

Learn Smarter, Track Your Progress in Real-Time

HD Video lectures, interactive mock tests, and a dedicated doubt solving portal. Everything a student needs to excel, in one beautiful app.

Video OS

Resume Anywhere

Live Analytics

Rank Tracking

The Smart Advantage

Not just another ERP — this is a
Smart Coaching OS

One-Click Automation

Send fee reminders, assignment alerts, and announcements instantly without effort.

Real-Time Student Tracking

Know exactly who is studying and who is not with deep behavioral analytics.

Doubt Solving System

Students can ask doubts directly from video timestamps for contextual learning.

Teacher Performance Insights

Track teaching effectiveness with real data on student engagement and results.

Business Growth Dashboard

Increase admissions with built-in CRM & advanced marketing analytics.

Professional Branding

Custom domain and white-labeled mobile apps for your institute.

"This system doesn’t just show data — it tells you what to do next."

The Game Changer

🤖 Smart Automation In Action

1 Click Fee Reminder

Send WhatsApp/SMS to all pending students instantly

Auto Assignment Follow-Up

Notify students who didn’t submit DPP

Smart Alerts

“Physics performance dropping” → Take action instantly

Bulk Announcements

Send updates to all students in seconds

Save 30+ hours every month.

Our automation OS handles all the tasks that suck your time.

Core Capabilities

Architecture of Intelligence.

One-Click Fee OS

Automate collection reminders via SMS, Mail and WhatsApp. Zero manual follow-ups required.

Doubt Priority Engine

Autonomous sorting of student doubts. Critical and weak student nodes prioritized automatically.

Batch Pulse Analytics

System tells you exactly where performance is dropping and suggests revision classes.

Investment Plans

Simple, Transparent Pricing

No hidden charges. Start free, scale as you grow.

Limited Time Offer

Get FREE setup + customization if you book demo this week. Only for first 10 institutes.
